description: Architecture-only positive and adversarial lifecycle traces for AuthorityGrant, protocol origin, data-use authority, and first-slice WorkLease. Passing does not admit or activate contracts.

cases.name: grant-bad-issue-directly-active
cases.expected_refusal_contains: declared_to does not equal legal result 'issued'

cases.name: grant-bad-activate-before-issue
cases.expected_refusal_contains: cannot apply authority.grant_activated from 'not_issued'

cases.name: grant-bad-use-before-active
cases.expected_refusal_contains: uses a grant while 'issued'

cases.name: grant-bad-exhaust-before-final-use
cases.expected_refusal_contains: exhausts before the exact final legal use

cases.name: grant-bad-expire-after-exhausted
cases.expected_refusal_contains: cannot apply authority.grant_expired from 'exhausted'

cases.name: grant-bad-double-activation
cases.expected_refusal_contains: cannot apply authority.grant_activated from 'active'

cases.name: grant-bad-use-after-revoked
cases.expected_refusal_contains: uses a grant while 'revoked'

cases.name: grant-bad-use-after-expired
cases.expected_refusal_contains: uses a grant while 'expired'

cases.name: grant-bad-start-not-from-absence
cases.expected_refusal_contains: does not start from aggregate absence

cases.name: grant-bad-not-single-use
cases.expected_refusal_contains: is not single-use

cases.name: grant-bad-final-use-not-immediately-exhausted
cases.expected_refusal_contains: exposes a final grant use without immediate exhaustion

cases.name: grant-bad-exceeds-max-uses
cases.expected_refusal_contains: exceeds max_uses

cases.name: grant-bad-unknown-event
cases.expected_refusal_contains: uses unknown grant event

cases.name: grant-bad-declared-from-drift
cases.expected_refusal_contains: declared_from does not equal folded state

cases.name: grant-bad-ends-unexhausted
cases.expected_refusal_contains: ends with an unexhausted final use

cases.name: protocol-bad-hidden-prior-canonical-state
cases.expected_refusal_contains: protocol origin fabricates or depends on a prior canonical state

cases.expected_refusal_contains: protocol origin lacks one or more exact validation evidence references

cases.name: protocol-bad-freeze-without-same-commit-integrity
cases.expected_refusal_contains: protocol freeze is not at index 1 of one four-event commit

cases.name: protocol-bad-origin-not-from-absence
cases.expected_refusal_contains: protocol origin is not explicitly from aggregate absence

cases.name: protocol-bad-first-version-not-one
cases.expected_refusal_contains: protocol origin does not materialize version 1

cases.expected_refusal_contains: protocol origin lacks an exact frozen ProtocolSnapshot reference

cases.name: protocol-bad-missing-source-draft-evidence
cases.expected_refusal_contains: protocol origin lacks exact source-draft evidence

cases.expected_refusal_contains: protocol origin lacks an exact exposure-history digest

cases.expected_refusal_contains: protocol origin lacks an exact integrity rule identity

cases.name: protocol-bad-assigned-role-authority
cases.expected_refusal_contains: protocol freeze lacks the bounded protocol grant

cases.name: protocol-bad-cohort-order-reversed
cases.expected_refusal_contains: protocol grant-use/freeze/integrity/exhaustion order is not exact

cases.expected_refusal_contains: protocol origin lacks grant_use_event_ref

cases.expected_refusal_contains: protocol origin lacks grant_exhaustion_event_ref
